name: Ale Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can (12 oz) beer or ale (no lite)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Add the beer. Mix in the green onions and cheese, if using.
3. Knead the dough briefly, adding more flour if it's sticky.
4. Form the dough into a round loaf and place it in a greased pie pan or on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, until golden brown and the loaf sounds hollow when tapped.
